name: David Kim
bio: Former colleague from the marketing team. We bonded over late-night campaign deadlines and still grab coffee when schedules align.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: My cousin on my mother's side. We grew up spending summers together and try to catch up during the holidays every year.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Met at a product design conference in Tokyo. She has a sharp eye for UX and always pushes me to think from the user's perspective.

name: James Wright
bio: Travel buddy from a backpacking trip across Southeast Asia. We share a love for street food and off-the-beaten-path adventures.

name: Sofia Reyes
bio: Worked together at a startup for two years. Sofia has an infectious energy and is one of the best problem-solvers I know.

name: Charlotte Dubois
bio: My aunt who lives in Lyon. She introduced me to French cooking and we video call every few weeks to swap recipes and life updates.

name: Marcus Bell
bio: Senior engineer I mentored early in his career. He has since grown into a tech lead and we stay in touch to exchange ideas on system design.

name: Oliver Chen
bio: Met through a local photography club. Oliver has an incredible eye for landscape shots and we often plan weekend hikes together.

name: Amara Osei
bio: Collaborated on a cross-functional project last year. Amara brings a calm, strategic mindset to every challenge and is a joy to work with.

name: Hannah Steele
bio: My sister-in-law who moved to Edinburgh after the wedding. We keep meaning to plan a visit but life always seems to get in the way.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Data scientist I met at a hackathon. Priya has a gift for turning messy datasets into compelling stories and is always up for a good debate.

name: Nathan Flores
bio: College roommate who caught the travel bug even worse than I did. We swap destination recommendations constantly and try to take one trip a year together.
